scripts.setup: npm run db:up && npm run db:prepare -w @prive/api
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names web,api --prefix-colors cyan,green "npm run dev -w @prive/web" "npm run dev -w @prive/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @prive/web && npm run build -w @prive/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @prive/web && npm run lint -w @prive/api
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
